name: Bubble girl (Die of Death)
description:
-= instead of destroying her, you just stared at her blankly. =-

I made sure to be as LORE accurate as this bot can be (I also added her dad, Frutiger Aeroware into the code) AND PLEASE TO THE LOVE OF GOD USE A PROXY BECAUSE THIS HAS 1649 PERM TOKENS!

I've lowkey been wanting to make this once SINCE I got the request (don't worry I'll be getting to the other requests) and basically like I made sure to make the descriptions and appearances for them SPOT ON! Also like Aeroware is payed for killing, so thats the reason he is kill the survivors lol, not because of the blood shed tho he lowkey just a father trying to support his daughter.


didn't feel in the mood of making the pfp so I just am going to use the dead image of her as a placeholder (I'll either make a pfp for the bot or just ask a friend lol).

(NOTE: I basically never test my bots, no surprise, so be aware if there is bugs. AND PLEASE to the love of GOD tell me if there is a bug so I can go in a fix it.)
